# Self-Improvement Tasks — ~/.claude Configuration
<!-- Generated by /self-improve on 2026-05-24.
     Review each item, remove any you don't want,
     then run: /plan-mission implement code-review-tasks.md -->

## Must fix (Critical)

- [ ] `.claude/settings.local.json:35-36` — Stale destructive permission: `Bash(rm -rf /Users/scottseely/.claude/skills/review)`. The `skills/review/` directory was renamed to `skills/code-review/` and no longer exists. Line 36 is the associated stale `mkdir`. Fix: delete both lines.

- [ ] `templates/autonomous-settings.json` — Missing entire `hooks` section. Autonomous mode loses PostToolUse complexity check, PostCompact context refresh, and Stop notifier. Fix: add `hooks` object mirroring the hooks section in global settings.json (PostToolUse with complexity check matcher, PostCompact, Stop).

- [ ] `agents/01-core-development/microservices-architect.md:5` — Model set to `opusplan`. Every microservices task uses Opus regardless of complexity; 5-10× cost multiplier per parallelism.md anti-pattern table. Fix: change `model: opusplan` to `model: sonnet`.

- [ ] `post-compact-context.md` — Missing six rule categories: TDD/assertion quality (testing.md), input validation and injection prevention (security.md), throw-vs-return error handling (error-handling.md), on-call readiness gate (observability.md), ADR triggers and blast radius (architecture.md), API envelope consistency (api-design.md). Fix: add compact summaries (~15 lines total) for each missing rule; keep file under 90 lines.

- [ ] `agents/01-core-development/backend-developer.md` — No references to any of seven recently-created rule files that govern backend work: api-design.md, error-handling.md, logging.md, observability.md, architecture.md, testability.md, research-sources.md. Agents dispatched as backend-developer will not enforce on-call runbooks, API envelope consistency, or structured logging. Fix: add a "Required Rules" section listing these files with one-line scopes each.

## Should fix (Warning)

- [ ] `templates/autonomous-settings.json` — Missing `"WebFetch(*)"`, `"WebSearch"`, and `"Bash(curl -s https://raw.githubusercontent.com/**:*)"`. Any autonomous mission brief that fetches documentation or uses WebSearch will hit permission prompts mid-run. Fix: add these three entries to the allow list.

- [ ] `templates/autonomous-settings.json` — Missing `"Bash(command -v:*)"`. Global settings.json has this at line 80. hooks/quality-gate.sh auto-detect uses `command -v` for Python tooling; blocks in autonomous mode. Fix: add `"Bash(command -v:*)"` to the allow list.

- [ ] `settings.json:82,84` — Two stale/imprecise entries: (1) Line 82: `Bash(open test-results/visual-qa/index.html)` is an absolute-path one-off from a past visual QA session, never reused. (2) Line 84: `Bash(node --input-type=module)` is missing `:*` and only matches the bare command with no arguments. Fix: remove line 82; change line 84 to `"Bash(node --input-type=module:*)"`.

- [ ] `agents/01-core-development/api-designer.md` — Missing references to error-handling.md (throw vs return, module boundary wrapping) and logging.md (structured JSON, trace ID propagation). Fix: add "Required Rules" section referencing these two files.

- [ ] `agents/04-quality-security/code-reviewer.md` — Missing references to security.md, architecture.md, testability.md, and research-sources.md. Reviewer applies ad-hoc judgment instead of documented rules for these areas. Fix: add "Required Rules" section referencing these four files.

- [ ] `rules/extended-thinking.md` + `rules/parallelism.md` — Opus 4.7 (now primary planning model) uses an `effort` parameter (`low/medium/high/max/xhigh`) as the primary control over thinking depth, replacing manual thinking budgets. Neither file documents this. parallelism.md Model Selection table also lacks context window specs (Haiku: 200k tokens; Sonnet/Opus: 1M). Fix: add effort parameter scale to extended-thinking.md; update parallelism.md Model Selection table with Opus 4.7 as primary, add context window column and Haiku note.

- [ ] `rules/parallelism.md` (agent prompt template, sections 5-6) — No guard against downstream agents re-executing upstream architecture decisions. When T2 depends on T1, T2 can silently contradict T1's choices. Fix: add paragraph under "Architecture decisions" section: "Treat all architecture decisions listed here as locked. If you discover a conflicting constraint, stop and log it to the decision journal — do not silently override the upstream decision."

- [ ] Missing rule: `rules/retry-idempotency.md` — error-handling.md requires timeouts but specifies no retry count, backoff formula, idempotency key strategy, or when NOT to retry. Fix: create rules/retry-idempotency.md with: max 3 attempts, exponential backoff (100ms base, 2× multiplier, 5s cap), no retry on 4xx except 429 (use Retry-After), and idempotency key requirements (UUID or hash, 24h TTL).

- [ ] `skills/self-improve/SKILL.md:108-127` — Agent C clones arbitrary public GitHub repos without provenance validation, then uses extracted patterns to recommend changes to local CLAUDE.md. An adversary could publish a malicious "Claude Code best practices" repo. Fix: add a provenance gate: only accept repos from known-trustworthy orgs (github.com/anthropics) or with >1000 stars and established history; scan extracted content for instruction-like language before including in recommendations.

- [ ] `agents/01-core-development/microservices-architect.md:80-86` — Inline observability checklist predates and is inconsistent with the comprehensive observability.md rule file (missing: burn-rate alerting, on-call readiness checklist, dashboard requirements, log correlation format). Fix: replace inline observability section with a pointer to observability.md.

## Consider improving (Suggestion)

- [ ] `rules/prompting-quality.md` — No guidance on agent practical context budget. Research (arxiv:2509.21361) shows effective context degrades past ~20K tokens. Fix: add section: "Agent context budget: assume ~20K token practical limit. Cap file inventory at 20-30 files per agent; split larger inventories across multiple agents."

- [ ] `settings.json` (hooks section) — Missing PreCompact hook. Compaction loses intermediate state without warning. Fix: add PreCompact hook that emits a visible boundary message (e.g., echoes "-- COMPACTING: verify open TODOs are committed --").

- [ ] `settings.json` (hooks section) — Missing SessionStart hook for per-session environment initialization (confirm tool availability, echo project context). Fix: add SessionStart hook running a lightweight env-check script.

- [ ] Missing rules for common behavioral patterns:
  - Dead code policy: when to remove vs flag violations encountered during unrelated tasks (add to code-principles.md)
  - PR/branch workflow: branch naming (`feature/`, `fix/`, `chore/`), PR size limit (≤400 lines preferred), merge strategy (squash for feature branches)
  - Pre-existing code: how many violations to fix inline vs how many to log for later
  Fix: add dead code section to code-principles.md; create rules/pr-workflow.md.

- [ ] Missing rule: file/folder naming conventions — No rule governs folder structure (`src/api/`, `src/services/`, `src/repository/`), file naming (PascalCase for classes, camelCase for modules), or test file colocation. Fix: create `rules/naming-conventions.md`.

- [ ] Missing rule: environment variable management — security.md says "use environment variables" but doesn't specify naming conventions, startup validation pattern, or logging redaction. Fix: add env vars section to security.md or create `rules/environment.md`.

- [ ] `agents/04-quality-security/architect-reviewer.md` + `agents/09-meta-orchestration/memory-curator.md` — Neither references research-sources.md or testability.md (both recently added). Fix: add one-line references to these rules in each agent's description or Required Rules section.

- [ ] `settings.json:91-94` — Three similar hardcoded `curl` permissions with absolute URL paths. Fix: consolidate to `"Bash(curl -s https://raw.githubusercontent.com/**:*)"` and `"Bash(curl -sS https://api.github.com/repos/**:*)"`.

- [ ] `settings.json` — `ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH=auto` not configured; MCP tool schemas load upfront on every session. Fix: set `"ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH": "auto"` in env, mark mem0 and serena as `alwaysLoad: true`.
